case_title: WILLIAM FLAHERTY VS. CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION (ADJUSTER: GARY PON) BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-29-2011 AT 10:00AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLAHERTY, WILLIAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, KEVIN CLAIM AGAINST CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLAHERTY, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, KEVIN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED FEB-25-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, KEVIN

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,854.00 FILED BY FLAHERTY, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION (ADJUSTER: GARY PON) SULLIVAN, KEVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED FEB-25-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION (ADJUSTER: GARY PON)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-29-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
